# Md Sadmanur Islam Shishir - Full-Stack Developer

A comprehensive professional reference for Md Sadmanur Islam Shishir, Full-Stack Web Developer specializing in scalable applications, WebRTC, real-time communication systems, and modern UI/UX design.

## Profile Summary
- **Name**: Md Sadmanur Islam Shishir
- **Job Title**: Full-Stack Web Developer
- **Company**: Pakiza Software Limited
- **Location**: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- **Education**: B.Sc. in Software Engineering, American International University, Bangladesh (CGPA: 3.61)

## Technical Arsenal

### Frontend
- Next.js, React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS

### Backend
- Node.js, Nest.js, Go (Golang), RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL

### Real-Time & Streaming
- WebRTC, Socket.io, RTMP, HLS, FFmpeg

### Databases & ORM
- MongoDB, MySQL, Mongoose, Prisma ORM, Sequelize

### DevOps & Tools
- Nginx, Git, Docker, Linux, Postman

---

## Selected Projects

### Live Streaming Platform
An enterprise-grade live video streaming solution with chat functionality.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, Go (Golang), RTMP, HLS, WebRTC, MongoDB.

### Video Conferencing App
A peer-to-peer and SFU video conferencing solution with screen sharing and instant messaging.
- **Tech Stack**: React, WebRTC, Socket.io, Node.js, Tailwind CSS.

### Enterprise E-Commerce Platform
A scalable shopping website with custom search, stripe billing integrations, and automated invoicing.
- **Tech Stack**: Next.js, Nest.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Docker.

---

## Work Experience

### Full-Stack Web Developer at Pakiza Software Limited
*Dhaka, Bangladesh — 2024 to Present*
- Build real-time streaming, WebRTC configurations, and scalable APIs.
- Lead migrations to modern frontends (Next.js/React).
